Off Calendar Sep-05-2013 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jan-14-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action As To Minor Kevin Xiong
Off Calendar Jul-25-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Minor's Compromise.
Department 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.
Andrew H. Meisel, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff(s) Petitioner (father & Guardian ad Litem of minor) Zi Zhong Xiong. Father, mother Mei Qing Mai and two minors present in court.
Petitioner Zi Zhong Xion sworn and examinded through Cantonese Interpreter Anna Wong.
After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:2. Minor: Settlement for minor Kevin Xiong
Total Settlement: $100,000.00
Attorney's Fees: $24,098.25 payable to Law Offices of Meisel & Krentsa.
Reimbursement for expenses paid by petitioner's attorney in the total amount of $3,607.00

A net balance of $72,294.75 to be deposited into a blocked account to be deposited into a blocked account at Bank of America 944 Stockton Street, San Francisco, CA until Minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Court signed Order Granting approval of Minor and Order to Deposit Money into blocked Account.
Status Hearing Scheduled on October 24, 2013 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for filing of receipt for the deposit of money into blocked account. No appearance is required if the receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodge with Depart. 514 prior to Hearing.

Notice Of Hearing For Petititon To Approve Compromise Of Minor Kerry Xiong
Off Calendar Jul-25-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Minor's Compromise.
Department 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.
Andrew H. Meisel, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff(s) Petitioner (father & Guardian ad Litem of minor) Zi Zhong Xiong. Father, mother Mei Qing Mai and two minors present in court.
Petitioner Zi Zhong Xion sworn and examinded through Cantonese Interpreter Anna Wong.
After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows: 1. Settlement for minor Kerry Xiong.
Total Settlement: $2,350,000.00
Attorney's Fees: $568,260.00 payable to Law Offices of Meisel & Krentsa.
Reimbursement for other expenses paid by Petitioner's attorney in the total amount of $76,959.86.
Medical, hospital, ambulance, nursing, and other like expenses payable directly to providers as follows, in the amount of $406,085.64
(i) Payee: Lucille Packard Children's Hospital 4700 Bohannon Drive, Menlo Park, CA 94025 in the amount of $400,000.00
(ii) Payee: Department of Health Care Services Recovery Section, MS 4720, P.O. Box 997425, Sacramento, CA 95899-7425 in the amount of $6,070.64
Total allowance for fees and expenses from the Settlement of Judgment $1,051,305.50
A net balance of $948,694.50 to be disbursed as follows:
Check payable to BHG Structered Settlements, Inc. in the amount of $350,000.00 to fund the structure settlement.
$940,000.00 to be divided by 4 and $235,000.00 to be deposited in each of the four interest-bearing, federally insured accounts:
1) The sum of $235, 000.00 to be deposited in a blocked account in the name of Zi Zhong Xiong as trustee for Kerry Xiong at Bank of America, 944 Stockton Street, San Francisco, CA, until Minor reaches the age of 18 years.
2) The sum of $235,000.00 is to be deposited in a blocked account in the name of Mei Qiong Mai as trustee for Kerry Xiong at Bank of America, 944 Stockton Street, San Francisco, CA.
3) The sum of $235, 000.00 to be deposited in a blocked account in the name of Zi Zhong Xiong as trustee for Kerry Xiong at Wells Fargo, 1015 Stockton Street, San Francisco, CA. until Minor reaches the age of 18 years.
4) The sum of $235,000.00 is to be deposited in a blocked account in the name of Mei Qiong Mai as trustee for Kerry Xiong at Wells Fargo, 1015 Stockton St., San Francisco, CA until Minor reaches the age of 18 years.

$8,694.50 is to be held in Meisel & Krentsa Client Trust Account to be used to resolve final DHCS/Medi-Cal lien. Said lien claim will be satisfied from this account if DHCS/Medi-Cal asserts a final lien claim exceeding the tentatively agreed amount of $6,070.64.
Any balance after payment to DHCS to be deposited in a trust account in a bank of petitioner's choice: Held in the name of Petitioner Zi Zhong Xiong in turst for Kerry Xiong, and Zi Zhong Ziong is aurthorizes to use said funds for the benefit of Kery Xiong; i,e., tutors, educational materials, school clothes, medical expenses, including counseling as needed, and the like.

Court signed Order Granting approval of Minor and Order to Deposit Money into blocked Accounts and Structured Settlement.
Status Hearing Scheduled on October 24, 2013 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for filing of receipt for the deposit of money into blocked accounts and Structured Settlement. No appearance is required if the receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodge with Department 514 prior to Hearing.
